backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the Internet Computer canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of yellow color styling for hero section text in the Hero component with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files describing the Pureblend Spice website structure, components, and styling with OKLCH color system and hero-yellow theme.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base configuration defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes with custom CSS variables for the design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Pureblend Spice application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the Home page as the main application view.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying company branding, copyright, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with background image overlay, company name and tagline in bright yellow (hero-yellow) with text shadows, three description paragraphs, and animated scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/MarketOpportunit: Market opportunity section showcasing clean-label demand and global growth trends, three target customer segments, and premium wellness positioning.
frontend/src/components/ProblemStatement: Problem statement section displaying four key industry challenges in card format with icons and a summary statement about Pureblend's solution approach.
frontend/src/components/RevenueModel.tsx: Displays a multi-channel revenue strategy section with four sales channels (Direct-to-Consumer, Retail Partnerships, Subscription Model, Premium Offerings), each showing icons, descriptions, and feature lists in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/components/SectionDivider.t: Renders a decorative divider component with a spice pattern background image, gradient overlays, and centered dots to visually separate page sections.
frontend/src/components/SocialImpact.tsx: Presents the social impact section highlighting partnerships with women-led farmer organizations, fair trade practices, sustainable agriculture, and community empowerment with an image and impact cards.
frontend/src/components/Solution.tsx: Showcases the product solution with features like preservative-free, no artificial colors, handcrafted quality, and clean label, plus nutritional enhancements from moringa and curry leaves in a two-column layout.
frontend/src/components/VisionCallToActi: Displays vision and mission statements in cards, followed by a call-to-action section seeking investment partners with contact information and partnership opportunities.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing AuthClient creation, identity state, and login status throughout the application.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Crimson Text and Inter), configures Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm terracotta/earthy color theme with light and dark mode variants using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that composes the landing page by rendering Hero, ProblemStatement, Solution, SocialImpact, MarketOpportunity, VisionCallToAction, RevenueModel, and Footer components with SectionDividers between them.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color system, typography plugins, custom fonts (Crimson Text and Inter), border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordions and fade-in effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata file tracking the website's purpose (Pureblend Spice company showcase), architectural notes, and implemented features including homepage, problem statement, solution, social impact, market opportunity, vision/CTA, and revenue model sections.
